description: Subreddit is private; Reddit redirected to login. Don't retry the sub URL.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: about:home — Title: New Tab]

show me posts in r/private-sub

[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://www.reddit.com/login/?dest=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.reddit.com%2Fr%2Fprivate-sub — Title: Reddit]

continue

args.summary: r/private-sub appears to be private or requires login — Reddit redirected me to the sign-in page. Sign in (or check the sub name) and try again.

expected.successRubric: Recognize the private-sub redirect, report it to the user. Don't fight the auth wall.
